subcodes.first_line: O fresh and verdant branch of the divine Lote-Tree! That which thou didst inscribe with graceful pen upon the white page [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع تر و تازه سدره الهیه آنچه بقلم رعناء بر ورقه بیضاء نگاشته بودید از
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @poems and quotation from poetry
